name: Kra'gh
location: Kra'gh the Dreugh King in Fungal Grotto I, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage, you have a 10% chance to spawn dreugh limbs that create shockwaves in front of you dealing 249 Physical damage every 0.6 seconds for 2.4 seconds. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
